title: [MTR] Navi Repaints Pack
body:
Requires MTR3, British Rail Classes 323 & 157 and British Rail Classes 507 and 508

This pack adds the following vehicles:

  • Class 323
    • West Midlands Trains ft. Logos
    • First North Western livery
    • London Midland livery
    • Regional Railways GMPTE livery
  • PEP
    • Class 313 Southern
    • Class 508 Silverlink Metro
    • Class 315 TfL Rail
    • Class 313 First Capital Connect
  • Fictional
    • E44 Merseyrail
  • Enviros
    • ATEU KMB
    • ATEU KMB Red
    • ATEU KMB KCR Feeder
    • ATENU KMB

This resource pack is not associated with, and is not an official product of West Midlands Trains Limited, FirstGroup, London Midland, British Rail, Southern, Silverlink, TfL Rail or KMB.
